meaning: n.贴边,袜口,伤痕vt.装饰,鞭打
examples: Mir war auf dieser Welt das Glück nicht hold!
There is another example. A famous singer can sing very welt.
The publisher of Bild and Die Welt recently recorded the most profitable first quarter in its history.
In a full page Die Welt interview, Vahrenholt explains why he grew skeptical of the IPCC.
The Welt am Sonntag newspaper said German authorities were now certain Bormann had committed suicide.
